parameters.query:
SELECT json_build_object(
  'stories', (
    SELECT coalesce(json_agg(
      json_build_object(
        'id', s.id,
        'title', s.title,
        'description', s.description,
        'outcome', s.outcome,
        'status', s.status,
        'priority', s.priority,
        'tags', s.tags,
        'created_at', s.created_at,
        'tasks', (
          SELECT coalesce(json_agg(
            json_build_object(
              'id', t.id,
              'story_id', t.story_id,
              'title', t.title,
              'description', t.description,
              'context', t.context,
              'output', t.output,
              'category', t.category,
              'priority', t.priority,
              'status', t.status,
              'assigned_to', t.assigned_to,
              'seq', t.seq,
              'tags', t.tags,
              'created_at', t.created_at
            ) ORDER BY t.seq NULLS LAST, t.created_at
          ), '[]'::json)
          FROM tasks t WHERE t.story_id = s.id
        )
      ) ORDER BY
        CASE s.priority WHEN 'urgent' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END,
        s.created_at
    ), '[]'::json)
    FROM stories s WHERE s.status != 'cancelled'
  ),
  'standalone', (
    SELECT coalesce(json_agg(
      json_build_object(
        'id', t.id,
        'title', t.title,
        'description', t.description,
        'context', t.context,
        'output', t.output,
        'category', t.category,
        'priority', t.priority,
        'status', t.status,
        'assigned_to', t.assigned_to,
        'tags', t.tags,
        'created_at', t.created_at
      ) ORDER BY
        CASE t.status WHEN 'agent_working' THEN 1 WHEN 'in_progress' THEN 2 WHEN 'review' THEN 3 WHEN 'ready' THEN 4 WHEN 'backlog' THEN 5 ELSE 6 END,
        CASE t.priority WHEN 'urgent' THEN 1 WHEN 'high' THEN 2 WHEN 'medium' THEN 3 ELSE 4 END,
        t.created_at
    ), '[]'::json)
    FROM tasks t WHERE t.story_id IS NULL AND t.status != 'done'
  ),
  'generated_at', now()
) as result
